{
  "generationRunId": "a2112b64-7738-4c69-83fa-3b141650c009",
  "screenId": "bfbe1f5e-dd53-44fe-be2b-264774128162",
  "projectId": "42b9d26f-9492-4c71-8671-0a38b7a0c519",
  "screenPlan": {
    "name": "Welcome",
    "type": "detail",
    "description": "Reference DNA: This screen mirrors the empty state layout from the reference. Visual Goal: Create a welcoming, distraction-free entry point that encourages the user to start their first habit. Layout Anatomy: The screen is vertically centered. At the top, a greeting 'Welcome Abdul' (hero_title) followed by 'Let's build your first habit' (body). In the center, a stylized potted plant illustration. Below this, the primary CTA 'Start your first habit' (button_label) is presented as an outlined pill button. Key Components: Header text, illustration, primary CTA button. Visual Styling: White background (#F9F9F7), high-contrast black text, warm earth-tone illustration. Interaction Notes: Tapping the CTA button navigates to the 'Create New Habit' screen. Must Preserve: The centered layout, the specific illustration style, and the clear, inviting tone.",
    "chromePolicy": {
      "chrome": "top-bar-back",
      "showPrimaryNavigation": false,
      "showsBackButton": true
    },
    "navigationItemId": null
  },
  "prompt": "Build these premium ios app screens",
  "designTokens": {
    "system_schema": "mobile_universal_core",
    "tokens": {
      "color": {
        "background": {
          "primary": "#F9F9F7",
          "secondary": "#F0F0EE"
        },
        "surface": {
          "card": "#FFFFFF",
          "bottom_sheet": "#FFFFFF",
          "modal": "#FFFFFF"
        },
        "text": {
          "high_emphasis": "#1A1A1A",
          "medium_emphasis": "#5A5A5A",
          "low_emphasis": "#999999"
        },
        "action": {
          "primary": "#A64B2A",
          "secondary": "#6B7C6E",
          "disabled": "#D1D1D1",
          "on_primary_text": "#FFFFFF"
        },
        "border": {
          "divider": "#E0E0DE",
          "focused": "#A64B2A"
        }
      },
      "typography": {
        "font_family": "'Playfair Display', 'Inter', 'JetBrains Mono', sans-serif",
        "nav_title": {
          "size": "14px",
          "weight": "500",
          "line_height": "20px"
        },
        "screen_title": {
          "size": "24px",
          "weight": "700",
          "line_height": "32px"
        },
        "hero_title": {
          "size": "34px",
          "weight": "700",
          "line_height": "40px"
        },
        "section_title": {
          "size": "20px",
          "weight": "600",
          "line_height": "28px"
        },
        "metric_value": {
          "size": "18px",
          "weight": "500",
          "line_height": "24px"
        },
        "body": {
          "size": "16px",
          "weight": "400",
          "line_height": "24px"
        },
        "supporting": {
          "size": "14px",
          "weight": "400",
          "line_height": "20px"
        },
        "caption": {
          "size": "12px",
          "weight": "400",
          "line_height": "16px"
        },
        "button_label": {
          "size": "16px",
          "weight": "600",
          "line_height": "20px"
        }
      },
      "spacing": {
        "none": "0px",
        "xxs": "4px",
        "xs": "8px",
        "sm": "12px",
        "md": "16px",
        "lg": "24px",
        "xl": "32px",
        "xxl": "48px"
      },
      "mobile_layout": {
        "screen_margin": "20px",
        "safe_area_top": "16px",
        "safe_area_bottom": "16px",
        "section_gap": "24px",
        "element_gap": "16px"
      },
      "sizing": {
        "min_touch_target": "48px",
        "standard_button_height": "56px",
        "standard_input_height": "52px",
        "icon_small": "20px",
        "icon_standard": "24px",
        "bottom_nav_height": "80px"
      },
      "radii": {
        "app": "16px",
        "pill": "9999px"
      },
      "border_widths": {
        "standard": "1px"
      },
      "shadows": {
        "none": "none",
        "surface": "0px 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)",
        "overlay": "0px 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)"
      },
      "opacities": {
        "transparent": "0",
        "disabled": "0.38",
        "scrim_overlay": "0.50",
        "pressed": "0.12",
        "opaque": "1"
      },
      "z_index": {
        "base": "0",
        "sticky_header": "10",
        "bottom_nav": "20",
        "bottom_sheet": "30",
        "modal_dialog": "40",
        "toast_snackbar": "50"
      }
    },
    "meta": {
      "recommendedFonts": [
        "Playfair Display",
        "Inter",
        "JetBrains Mono"
      ]
    }
  },
  "image": {
    "data": "",
    "mimeType": "image/jpeg"
  },
  "requiresBottomNav": true,
  "navigationArchitecture": {
    "kind": "bottom-tabs-app",
    "primaryNavigation": "bottom-tabs",
    "rootChrome": "bottom-tabs",
    "detailChrome": "top-bar-back",
    "consistencyRules": [
      "All primary destinations must be accessible via the bottom navigation dock.",
      "The bottom navigation dock must be a floating, pill-shaped container with a consistent shadow.",
      "Detail screens (like 'Create New Habit') must use a top-bar-back chrome and hide the bottom navigation.",
      "Primary actions (like 'Start your first habit') should use the primary action color (#A64B2A) for high visibility.",
      "All screens must maintain the established monochromatic palette with specific accent colors for status indicators."
    ],
    "rationale": "A bottom-tabs architecture is ideal for this habit-tracking app as it provides quick access to the core dashboard, history/insights, and settings, while keeping the primary 'add' action easily reachable."
  },
  "navigationPlan": {
    "enabled": true,
    "kind": "bottom-tabs",
    "items": [
      {
        "id": "home",
        "label": "Home",
        "icon": "home",
        "role": "Primary landing destination",
        "linkedScreenName": "Home"
      }
    ],
    "visualBrief": "Create a project-specific modern mobile navigation shell. Infer whether it should feel like a floating dock, glass pill, minimal tab rail, sculpted bottom card, or compact action dock from the reference image, creative direction, and product tone. Avoid generic 2015 equal-width tab bars.",
    "screenChrome": [
      {
        "screenName": "Welcome",
        "chrome": "top-bar-back",
        "navigationItemId": null
      },
      {
        "screenName": "CreateNewHabit",
        "chrome": "top-bar-back",
        "navigationItemId": null
      },
      {
        "screenName": "Home",
        "chrome": "bottom-tabs",
        "navigationItemId": "home"
      }
    ]
  },
  "projectCharter": {
    "originalPrompt": "Build these premium iOS app screens based on the provided reference images.",
    "imageReferenceSummary": "The reference images show a clean, minimalist habit tracker. Key elements include a floating bottom navigation dock, a centered illustration for empty states, a simple form for habit creation, and a list-based dashboard with streak tracking and daily completion checkboxes.",
    "appType": "Habit Tracker",
    "targetAudience": "Productivity-focused individuals seeking a minimalist, distraction-free habit tracking experience.",
    "navigationModel": "Bottom-tabs for primary navigation (Home, History, Settings) with a floating action button for quick habit creation.",
    "navigationArchitecture": {
      "kind": "bottom-tabs-app",
      "primaryNavigation": "bottom-tabs",
      "rootChrome": "bottom-tabs",
      "detailChrome": "top-bar-back",
      "consistencyRules": [
        "All primary destinations must be accessible via the bottom navigation dock.",
        "The bottom navigation dock must be a floating, pill-shaped container with a consistent shadow.",
        "Detail screens (like 'Create New Habit') must use a top-bar-back chrome and hide the bottom navigation.",
        "Primary actions (like 'Start your first habit') should use the primary action color (#A64B2A) for high visibility.",
        "All screens must maintain the established monochromatic palette with specific accent colors for status indicators."
      ],
      "rationale": "A bottom-tabs architecture is ideal for this habit-tracking app as it provides quick access to the core dashboard, history/insights, and settings, while keeping the primary 'add' action easily reachable."
    },
    "keyFeatures": [
      "Daily habit tracking with streak visualization",
      "Simple habit creation flow",
      "Visual progress indicators",
      "Minimalist, distraction-free interface"
    ],
    "designRationale": "The design prioritizes clarity and focus. By using a monochromatic base with warm earth-tone accents, the app feels grounded and calm. Generous whitespace and a clear, consistent navigation structure ensure that the user's focus remains on their daily habits.",
    "creativeDirection": {
      "conceptName": "Grounded Growth",
      "styleEssence": "Minimalist, calm, and intentional. The design avoids clutter to emphasize the user's daily progress.",
      "colorStory": "Monochromatic base (#F9F9F7 background, #1A1A1A text) with a warm, earthy accent color (#A64B2A) for primary actions and highlights.",
      "typographyMood": "Clean, legible sans-serif (SF Pro or Inter). High contrast for titles, subtle for supporting text.",
      "surfaceLanguage": "Clean white surfaces (#FFFFFF) for cards and the navigation dock, floating with subtle shadows to create depth.",
      "iconographyStyle": "Thin-stroke, geometric, and minimalist. Consistent with standard iOS icon sets.",
      "compositionPrinciples": [
        "Center-aligned content for empty states to create focus.",
        "Vertical stacking for lists to ensure readability.",
        "Floating navigation dock to keep the interface feeling light and unanchored."
      ],
      "signatureMoments": [
        "The floating navigation dock with the integrated FAB.",
        "The streak badge with the flame icon.",
        "The horizontal calendar strip for quick date navigation."
      ],
      "motionTone": "Smooth, standard iOS transitions (slide-in for new screens, fade for state changes).",
      "avoid": [
        "Overly complex gradients or heavy drop shadows.",
        "Cluttered layouts with too many competing elements."
      ]
    },
    "referenceScreens": [
      {
        "index": 1,
        "suggestedRole": "Empty state / Welcome screen",
        "layoutSummary": "Centered content layout. Top-aligned greeting, vertically centered illustration and call-to-action, bottom-aligned navigation dock.",
        "visualHierarchy": "1. Greeting text, 2. Central illustration, 3. CTA button, 4. Bottom navigation.",
        "components": [
          "Header text (Welcome Abdul)",
          "Sub-header text (Let's build your first habit)",
          "Central illustration (Stylized potted plant)",
          "Body text (Start your first habit + description)",
          "Primary CTA button (Outlined pill shape)",
          "Bottom navigation dock (Floating pill with 3 icons + 1 floating action button)"
        ],
        "stylingCues": [
          "Soft rounded corners on buttons",
          "High contrast black text on white background",
          "Floating navigation dock with subtle shadow",
          "Illustration uses flat, geometric shapes with warm earth tones"
        ],
        "interactionCues": [
          "CTA button has a plus icon prefix",
          "Bottom dock has active state styling on the home icon"
        ],
        "copyPatterns": [
          "Personalized greeting",
          "Action-oriented instructional text"
        ],
        "implementationNotes": [
          "The bottom navigation is a floating pill-shaped container separate from the screen edges.",
          "The illustration is vertically centered between the header and the bottom nav."
        ]
      },
      {
        "index": 2,
        "suggestedRole": "Create new habit form",
        "layoutSummary": "Top-aligned back button and title. Form field below title. Horizontal list of suggestion chips. Large bottom-aligned primary action button.",
        "visualHierarchy": "1. Screen title, 2. Input field, 3. Suggestion chips, 4. Continue button.",
        "components": [
          "Back navigation arrow",
          "Screen title (Create new habit)",
          "Input field (Label + text box)",
          "Horizontal scrollable chips (Drink Water, Exercise, Read 10 mins)",
          "Primary CTA button (Solid black pill)"
        ],
        "stylingCues": [
          "Input field is a simple underline or minimal border style",
          "Chips are light grey rounded rectangles",
          "Primary button is full-width with rounded corners"
        ],
        "interactionCues": [
          "Back arrow indicates navigation stack",
          "Chips suggest quick-select functionality"
        ],
        "copyPatterns": [
          "Clear, imperative labels",
          "Placeholder text in input field"
        ],
        "implementationNotes": [
          "The 'Continue' button is fixed to the bottom of the screen, likely above the safe area.",
          "The layout uses standard iOS navigation patterns."
        ]
      },
      {
        "index": 3,
        "suggestedRole": "Habit dashboard / Home screen",
        "layoutSummary": "Top-aligned date calendar strip. Vertical list of habit cards. Bottom-aligned navigation dock.",
        "visualHierarchy": "1. Date calendar strip, 2. Habit cards (Title + Streak + Checkbox row), 3. Bottom navigation.",
        "components": [
          "Date calendar strip (Day name + Date number)",
          "Habit card (Title, Streak badge, Checkbox row)",
          "Checkbox row (3 checked, 1 empty, 3 letters for future days)",
          "Bottom navigation dock (Same as screen 1)"
        ],
        "stylingCues": [
          "Active date in calendar is highlighted with a soft red background",
          "Streak badge is a dark pill with a flame icon",
          "Checkboxes are circular outlines; completed ones have a checkmark",
          "Future days are represented by single letters (F, S, S)"
        ],
        "interactionCues": [
          "Checkboxes act as toggle buttons for daily completion",
          "Bottom dock active state on home icon"
        ],
        "copyPatterns": [
          "Habit names (e.g., Drink Water (Daily))",
          "Streak count (e.g., 25 days streak)",
          "Instructional text (Tap to mark today)"
        ],
        "implementationNotes": [
          "The calendar strip is a horizontal row.",
          "Habit cards are stacked vertically with consistent spacing.",
          "The checkbox row is a horizontal sequence of circles."
        ]
      }
    ],
    "designSystemSignals": {
      "palette": "Monochromatic (Black/White/Grey) with a specific accent color (Red/Orange) for streaks and date highlights.",
      "typography": "System sans-serif (likely SF Pro), clean, varying weights for hierarchy (Bold for titles, Regular for body).",
      "surfaces": "Clean white background, floating navigation dock with shadow, pill-shaped buttons.",
      "iconography": "Simple, thin-stroke, geometric icons (Home, Clock, Settings, Plus, Flame, Checkmark).",
      "density": "Spacious, generous padding between elements, comfortable touch targets.",
      "motionTone": "Likely smooth, standard iOS transitions (slide-in for new screens, fade for state changes)."
    },
    "planningDiagnostics": {
      "source": "partial_planner",
      "validationIssues": [
        "navigation_plan.screen_chrome.1.chrome: Invalid option: expected one of \"bottom-tabs\"|\"top-bar\"|\"top-bar-back\"|\"modal-sheet\"|\"immersive\"",
        "screens.0.chrome_policy.chrome: Invalid option: expected one of \"bottom-tabs\"|\"top-bar\"|\"top-bar-back\"|\"modal-sheet\"|\"immersive\""
      ],
      "rawPlanKeys": [
        "navigation_architecture",
        "navigation_plan",
        "charter",
        "screens"
      ],
      "rawScreenCount": 3,
      "recoveredScreens": 3,
      "notes": [
        "Recovered planner output independently instead of replacing the whole charter with generic fallback.",
        "Screen plans came from valid planner screen objects."
      ]
    },
    "charterSource": "partial_planner"
  },
  "projectContext": null
}
